## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests

## Validation

- [ ] Tests added/updated where practical
- [ ] Manual verification done
- [ ] No regressions observed in touched flows

## Screenshots / Recording (UI only)

Attach before/after visuals when relevant.

## Checklist

- [ ] Focused scope (no unrelated edits)
- [ ] Documentation updated where needed
- [ ] Follows repository conventions
